message:
test(linalg): wire kron Kronecker product conformance cases

Added 4 differential goldens for np.kron: swap-kron (2x2 ⊗ 2x2),
right-identity 2x3 ⊗ I2, scalar-kron-scales-matrix (1x1 ⊗ 2x2),
and identity-kron-identity yielding a 6x6 block identity.

Registered kron in the linalg differential dispatcher using
matrix[0]/shape for operand a and matrix[1]/rhs_shape for operand b.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
